name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light green with white mini. This Capucines mini handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
